item.dc:creator: willpostanything

item.title: *Angle grinder noises*
item.description: For the morbidly curious (warning: trauma ahead) - https://imgur.com/gallery/i-just-need-someone-else-to-know-because-its-driving-me-crazy-IMvvspl Edit: I am... Floored. Flabbergasted. Overwhelmed by how much love y'all have poured out for me. I feel like I've been brought into the biggest and most loving family and have gained all the wonderful parents, brothers and sisters I never thought I'd have. I'm truly, honestly just completely and utterly overwhelmed. I hope, I really and genuinely hope that if one thing comes from what I thought would just be me yelling into the void to a luke-warm nonresponse, it's that someone - maybe you reading this - feels like you can accept yourself for who you are. You don't have to scream it out loud like I did, you don't even have to tell anyone if you don't want to or you can't for whatever reason, but I hope you accept yourself and know that there are many, many people out there who wish you nothing but the absolute best, who love you for who you are, who you want to be the you you really are. Whatever that means, be it gay, bi, pan, ace, trans, enby, genderfluid... Love yourself, and embrace who you are. You are absolutely not alone. Take it from this overwhelmed, crying trans girlie - you are absolutely not alone, and we love you.
item.dc:creator: MythIncarnate

item.title: The Nineteenthst, Wholesome Edition: Heartwarming.
item.description:
So wholesome. So fun. So heartwarming.
Child works full time job because America doesn't have proper healthcare.
Colleagues give up PTO because America doesn't have support systems for illnesses like this, or proper healthcare.
For profit prison refuses to do anything that might actually rehabilitate it's inmates. Child attempts to correct.
England doesn't have proper safety and support structures for childbirth.
Brennan Lee Mulligan on GoFundMe: https://youtu.be/tIsXEkR5OVs?si=wCGBv7SkpGEjRKAW
6 year old has childhood robbed from him in order to pay for necessary medical expenses.
Child forced to labor so that parent can afford transportation.
Man kills himself because America doesn't have proper safety and support systems for the ill.
Child slowly commits suicide because America doesn't have proper healthcare.
item.dc:creator: villainousdescent

item.title: Rest in peace my beautiful Link
item.description: My beautiful Link had a heart attack and went to the rainbow bridge. He was standing one second, dead the next. I can’t get over it or over him. What do I do now??

item.title: Dr WebMD
item.description: To those who find it not believable that doctors would have that much trouble figuring out what was wrong consider the following: Last summer I had a SUPER bad reaction to a new anxiety medication. I soon ended up in the ER with literally debilitating stomach pain and nausea that wouldn't go away. The doctors ran some tests and told me they couldn't see anything wrong, so they billed half of what I earn in a year and sent me home with nothing to treat the symptoms. However, that ER visit was enough to get me pushed to the front of the list with the only gastro specialist in town who would see me and I spent the rest of the year seeing them and other doctors, getting every test under the sun performed on me to figure out what was making me so ill that I ended up having to work from home for quite a while due to not having enough sick days and being too ill to leave the house. After several months all the doctors and specialists concluded that they had no idea what was making me so ill and could do nothing to help me. However, a little searching online for information on the drug I had the reaction to revealed reports that the reaction I had was a rare (but documented) possible side effect of the medication. Somehow, despite constantly telling my doctors about this they never even bothered to look into the medication. I ultimately had to let the problem heal on it's own over the course of half a year.
item.dc:creator: Othagovna
